## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/F23PYqinoNFG_GMcLXWYxisFsZoxaJzp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic SEO template for bell ringer space drafted; awaiting feedback](https://fathom.video/share/F23PYqinoNFG_GMcLXWYxisFsZoxaJzp?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Content artifacts updated based on feedback; new articles created for review](https://fathom.video/share/F23PYqinoNFG_GMcLXWYxisFsZoxaJzp?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Site performance showing significant improvement: 35% increase in clicks, 59k more impressions](https://fathom.video/share/F23PYqinoNFG_GMcLXWYxisFsZoxaJzp?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Math-related content performing well; potential to expand on math topics (pending platform capabilities)](https://fathom.video/share/F23PYqinoNFG_GMcLXWYxisFsZoxaJzp?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Team changes: Martha replacing Addy for SchoolAI content generation](https://fathom.video/share/F23PYqinoNFG_GMcLXWYxisFsZoxaJzp?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
